title: Cobblemon German
description: German translations for Cobblemon - play with German Pokémon names while keeping Minecraft in English!
body:
Use this resource pack to experience Cobblemon in German without changing Minecraft itself away from English.

## 🌟 Features  
- German Cobblemon localization based on the official mod translations  
- Updated alongside new Cobblemon translation changes  
- Pack versions aligned with Cobblemon releases for proper compatibility  

## 🧩 Installation  
1. Download the resource pack  
2. Move it into your `resourcepacks` folder  
3. Turn it on in-game through **Options → Resource Packs**  
4. Leave your Minecraft language set to **English (US)**  

## ⚙️ What it does?
The pack swaps the default `en_us.json` file with Cobblemon’s official German translation files. As a result, Cobblemon content such as Pokémon names, item tooltips, and interface text appears in German, while the rest of Minecraft stays in English.

## 📝 License  
This resource pack includes translation content from [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), which is licensed under the Mozilla Public License 2.0.
